request.message: Patch improves vendor-lead-discovery output with segment-specific lead presets, query-term parsing, fit scores, qualifying signals, outreach angles, first-contact proof package, expected USDC price bands, search strategy, scoring model, and richer output_schema. Patch file: https://github.com/kgy7247/proofdeskqa-oobe-agent/blob/main/output/pyrimid-vendor-lead-discovery-output.patch. Validation: git diff --check, npm install, npm run build all passed in a fresh pyrimid clone.
